name: 反派被送精神病院
description: 養女曾威脅要把女主送進精神病院，最終自己反而被送進去。以其人之道還治其人之身的報應感讓觀眾極度滿足。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: I'm not sick. I won't take medicine. I refuse shots. I don't want an injection. ... Oh, sister, I was wrong. Please don't send me away.
